cast.name: 弗朗西斯科·迪·莱瓦 Francesco Di Leva
安东尼娅·特波 Antonia Truppo

director.name: 尼克拉·普洛萨托勒 Nicola Prosatore

this_title: Il serpente, niente è come sembra
introduction: Country roads at night. Marta is driving home when a tree falls in the middle of the street and it forces her to stop. She gets out of the car and she tries to move the tree. But suddenly, another car appears behind her and it begins to pursue her. A man came into the car while Martha moves the tree. But she does not see him. And now she runs away from the car that wants to save her, carrying Death as a passenger. A series of misunderstandings in a stunning story where nothing is as it seems. —Anonymous
chinese_title: Il serpente, niente è come sembra
